channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Turkiye says NATO bringing in more defences after missile interceptions
item.description: NATO to deploy a new Patriot missile defence unit to southern Turkiye's Incirlik Air Base.

item.title: Iranian women footballers arrive in eastern Turkiye, on home border
item.description: The team is on last leg of its journey home from Australia after Asian Cup, which began before conflict in Middle East.

item.title: How Iran defied Trump threats to emerge as Strait of Hormuz gatekeeper
item.description: Trump has called on other navies to help open the strait, but countries are instead striking deals with Iran.

item.title: Israel says it kills Iran intel minister in third assassination in two days
item.description: Israel gives military permission to strike Iranian leaders at will as Iran has yet to confirm death of Esmaeil Khatib.

item.title: Iranian diaspora celebrates Persian festival wrapped in US, Israeli flags
item.description: Dancing on a beach in Barcelona, members of the Iranian diaspora celebrated the Persian festival of Chaharshanbe Suri.

item.title: ‘US and Israel have taken majority of Iran’s ballistic missile capability’
item.description: ‘US and Israel have taken the vast majority of Iran’s ballistic missile capability’

item.title: Why Israel targets Beirut’s Dahiyeh and what the suburb means to Lebanon
item.description: Dahiyeh's story is not only about Hezbollah or Israel. It is about how it came to embody Lebanon’s deepest inequalities.

item.title: Beirut building turned to rubble by Israeli attack
item.description: Several central neighbourhoods in Beirut have been attacked in a series of Israeli strikes.

item.title: The oil logic behind Trump’s war on Iran
item.description: The Kharg Island strike shows how US force is calibrated to avoid disrupting global oil flows.

item.title: Aftermath of Iranian ‘revenge’ strikes on Israel, two killed
item.description: Widespread damage was left across areas near Tel Aviv after overnight Iranian missile strikes.
